app.sections.subscriptions_page.none_abonnement_available: No subscriptions available at the moment.
app.sections.subscriptions_page.recevez_blends_favorites: Receive your favorite creations every month, without thinking about it. Choose your formula and enjoy continuous infusion.
app.sections.subscriptions_page.hero_title: Your favorite creations, on premium replenishment with 10% off.
app.sections.subscriptions_page.hero_body: Choose an existing creation or compose your own in the atelier, then activate replenishment every 1, 2 or 3 months from your usual purchase flow.
app.sections.subscriptions_page.hero_badge_account: Card, cancellation and invoices in My Account
app.sections.subscriptions_page.card_existing_title: Subscribe to a creation you already love
app.sections.subscriptions_page.card_existing_body: Best if you already have a favorite creation: the recipe stays the same, and you only choose the format and delivery cadence.
app.sections.subscriptions_page.card_existing_benefit_one: Same creation, same flavor profile at every renewal.
app.sections.subscriptions_page.card_existing_benefit_two: Choose your format and receive it every 1, 2, or 3 months.
app.sections.subscriptions_page.card_existing_benefit_three: Perfect for quickly restarting a creation you already know.
app.sections.subscriptions_page.card_creator_title: Build a subscription that feels truly yours
app.sections.subscriptions_page.card_creator_body: If you want something more personal, create your blend in the atelier and activate replenishment once it feels right.
app.sections.subscriptions_page.card_creator_benefit_one: Your subscription follows your exact custom recipe.
app.sections.subscriptions_page.card_creator_benefit_two: You choose the format and rhythm from the start.
app.sections.subscriptions_page.card_creator_benefit_three: Ideal for always keeping your signature creation at home.
app.sections.subscriptions_page.step_one: Choose an existing creation or build your own, then pick the cadence that fits you.
app.sections.subscriptions_page.step_two: Place your first order with your usual delivery option.
app.sections.subscriptions_page.step_three: After that, you can manage renewals, invoices, and cancellation anytime from My Account.
app.sections.subscriptions_page.faq_title: What to know before activating your ritual
app.sections.subscriptions_page.faq_one_body: No. The subscription is intentionally limited to My Own Tea creations to keep the offer coherent and premium.
app.sections.subscriptions_page.faq_two_title: What do I need before subscribing?
app.sections.subscriptions_page.faq_two_body: A signed-in customer account, plus a default delivery address in your customer area.
app.sections.subscriptions_page.faq_three_title: How are card updates or cancellation handled?
app.sections.subscriptions_page.faq_three_body: From your customer account: card updates, cancel-at-period-end, reactivation and invoice access.

app.sections.testimonials.offert_melange_personnalise: I offered a custom blend to my team. The packaging is magnificent and the taste is there. An original gift!
app.sections.testimonials.qualite_ingredients_exceptionnelle: The quality of the ingredients is exceptional. I created a spicy mix to accompany my desserts, and my customers love it!
app.sections.testimonials.price_raisonnable_qualite: The price is very reasonable for the quality. I love being able to experiment with different combinations depending on my mood!
app.sections.testimonials.my_melange_serenite: My â€œSerenityâ€ blend with chamomile and verbena is perfect after my yoga sessions. A real well-being break.
app.sections.testimonials.experience_unique_created: A unique experience! I created my â€œRÃ©veil en Provenceâ€ blend with lavender and green tea. It has become my essential morning ritual.

app.sections.top_creations.none_blend_classee: No classified creations available at the moment.
app.sections.top_creations.decouvrez_blends_mieux: Discover the top-ranked creations from our community and personalize them in the workshop or add them directly to the cart.
